360 Video Booth Rental in Bridgewater NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals offers 360 Video Booth rentals for selected events in Bridgewater NS. Guests step onto the platform, the camera arm rotates for a slow-motion video — perfect for birthdays, graduations, school events, corporate events, fundraisers, and weddings. Available standalone or as an add-on with any inflatable or party package. Setup, takedown, and operator included.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Travel fee applies after the first 15 km from Bridgewater ($0.72/km). Final travel cost confirmed before booking.

Featured Rentals

  • 360 Photo Booth - Photo Booth, From $249, Dry-use - 360 Photo Booth rental for weddings, graduations, birthdays, school events, community events, corporate events, church events, and fundraisers in Nova Scotia.

Best For

  • Birthdays and milestone celebrations
  • Graduations and school events
  • Corporate events and fundraisers
  • Weddings and family celebrations

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer 360 Video Booth rentals in Bridgewater?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals offers 360 Video Booth rentals in Bridgewater NS. Contact us to confirm availability and travel cost for your event date.
What does the 360 Video Booth cost?
Standalone: $249 for 1 hour, additional hours $125/hr. Add-on with any inflatable or package: $199 for 1 hour, additional hours $70/hr. Operator included.
What is included with the 360 Video Booth?
Setup and takedown are included. Operator is included. 26.8" rotating platform, camera arm, and RGB ring light provided.
Can I add the 360 Video Booth to an inflatable rental?
Yes. The 360 Video Booth is available as an add-on with any inflatable rental or party package, starting at $199 for 1 hour.
Is booking confirmed after I submit the form?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Availability, travel cost, and pricing are confirmed manually before your rental is finalized.
